title: Kratie Heat Wave
lead: Kratie is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.71. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Kratie is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 74%, and the wind speed is moderate at 17.8 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has significant implications for the city's infrastructure and daily life, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Kratie immediately.
